Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Confirming The Arbitration Award And Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To The Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioners Judith Millington and Pamela Jackson's motion to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk
